userMessage: Set CH1 to 500mV DC 50 ohm and CH2 to 1V AC coupled

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Set CH1 and CH2 Input Configuration","description":"Configure CH1 to 500 mV/div, DC coupling, 50 ohm termination, and CH2 to 1 V/div, AC coupling on an MSO4/5/6 scope.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Termination and Coupling","params":{"command":"CH1:TERmination 50; CH1:COUPling DC"}},{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Vertical Scale","params":{"command":"DISplay:WAVEView1:CH1:VERTical:SCAle 0.5"}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Set CH2 Coupling","params":{"command":"CH2:COUPling AC"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Set CH2 Vertical Scale","params":{"command":"DISplay:WAVEView1:CH2:VERTical:SCAle 1"}},{"id":"s6","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"id":"s7","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
